title: Field Value Linked To
text: Field Value Linked To Native OCX property that holds the value of the field. Usage Dynamic? No Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: The available properties depend on the OCX control Applies to: uOcxContainer (OcxContainer) Description One OCX property can be mapped to the field value. If the field value is changed, this OCX property is also changed. If the OCX property is changed (for example, by the user), the field value is also changed. For information about the properties of the OCX control, refer to its technical documentation. Using in ProcScript This is a static property. It cannot be set in ProcScript. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
